title: Classic Aubergine Parmigiana
description: A heart-warming Italian classic featuring layers of fried aubergine, rich tomato sauce, and melted mozzarella.
instructions: Layer the aubergine slices in a colander, sprinkling each layer with salt. Let sit for 30 minutes to draw out moisture.
Rinse and pat dry the aubergine slices.
Heat olive oil in a pan and fry aubergine slices until golden on both sides. Drain on paper towels.
In a separate pan, sauté garlic in olive oil, then add passata and simmer for 15 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
In a baking dish, spread a little sauce, then a layer of aubergine, followed by sauce, mozzarella, parmesan, and basil.
Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, finishing with plenty of parmesan.
Bake at 200°C (400°F) for about 30 minutes until bubbling and golden.

title: Zesty Lemon Pancake
description: Fluffy, golden pancakes with a bright citrus kick. Perfect for a lazy Sunday morning.
instructions: Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar into a large bowl.
In another bowl, whisk the egg, milk, and lemon zest.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry and stir until just combined (don't overbeat).
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour a small amount of batter into the pan for each pancake.
Flip when bubbles appear on the surface and cook for another minute until golden.
Serve warm with honey or maple syrup.

title: Midnight Berry Smoothie
description: An antioxidant-rich boost featuring blueberries, blackberries, and a hint of mint.
instructions: Place berries, banana, and mint leaves into a blender.
Add almond milk, Greek yogurt, and honey.
Blend on high until completely smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass and garnish with an extra mint leaf.
